name: Cucumber Salad (Hess)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the cucumbers lengthwise and remove seeds.
2. Dice the cucumber pieces.
3. Add the remaining ingredients to a bowl with the diced cucumber.
4. Mix thoroughly.
5. Chill for at least 1/2 hour before serving.
This recipe serves 10, but it can easily be doubled for 5 servings. Food Exchanges per Serving: 1 Vegetable Serving CHO (6g), 3 Protein grams (3g), 3 Fat grams (3g), 39 Calories, and no salt is needed.
